title: Tamper-evident, privacy-safe operational observability
acceptance: Trace events are durably hash-chained and gates detect modification, deletion, reordering, duplication, and truncation.
Secrets and configured PII are protected before persistence and again before presentation.
CLI and Observatory expose correlated structured errors, metrics, readiness, SLO signals, and a redacted verifiable support bundle.
